name: zvid_accepted_hardware_renderer_count_cached
description: zVid::GetAcceptedHardwareRendererCount_Cached returns the cached count of accepted hardware renderer records.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 4 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 6 bytes and the VC object body is 16 bytes with 10 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies that zVid::GetAcceptedHardwareRendererCount_Cached reads g_zVid_AcceptedHardwareRendererCount as part of the cached renderer/texture-count accessor checks.
